p.span: How about I throw in a tour of the city?
That sounds like so much fun!
So has anything unusual taken place?
Nothing at all, thanks to you.
This is what you wanted, right?
But this is all I have on me.
Then this is all I can sell you.
Naples, a city in Southern Italy,
Could you tell us how to get
I told you it was that way!
Okay, I'm sorry. Thank you very much--
Pardon me, but you dropped this.
Hey, wasn't that guy so hot?
We should have taken a picture.
Did those just come from my purse?
Probably just landed on you now.
you can't let your guard down.
I've told you time after time.
It'll be faster than lining up.
I'll get you into the city real cheap.
I made it clear that you could do business
only after paying the protection fees.
I told you to pay me first, didn't I?
You should be cherishing my friendship
I'm not the only one working
That kid seems to be making
If you don't have a license,
Now then. Time to get to work.
Haruno Shiobana. That's an unusual name.
I suppose I'll go to the hotel first
to put my suitcase down and relax.
Now where can I get a taxi…
Ain't it? Such a cool trick!
How can he stuff his whole ear in there?
Be sure to stay out of trouble
I'm done with my part-time gig for the day
so I'll drive you for cheap.
How about 180,000 lire into the city?
Market price is only half of that.
Wow. Your Italian is very fluent.
Have you lived in Italy before?
No. It's just that Master Rohan
More importantly, you're going to drive?
you're still in middle or high school.
I could see a bit of money.
In that case, 10,000 lire is fine.
The 10,000 lire will get you to town.
I'll just wait for a taxi.
you'll have to carry your own luggage
You can place your luggage in the front.
I may look like a naive Japanese tourist,
Of course. I promise to go to your hotel.
But only your bag will make it there.
I haven't gotten in the car yet.
I warned you not to underestimate me.
You can leave if you want.
I just want my luggage back.
and a name like Giorno Giovanna,
no one would know he's Japanese.
It feels like a real living creature!
And why is my suitcase not here?
He didn't even have time to hide it.
I don't think it's true, but…
About the taxi driver just now…
This is the first time we've spoken.
Giorno, do you know who I am?
I heard you got into a fight,
in the face, you wouldn't stop fighting.
even though the wound has healed.
Come sit beside me for a moment.
Just sit. I don't want to strain my neck
you've got to follow the three noes.
The third is no disrespect to your friend.
Those are the three noes of friendship.
Who gave you permission to speak, asshole?
It seems you've been taking on
I still haven't received the respect
I should be getting from you.
if you're looking for the protection fee,
I paid it. I don't have money.
I've got nothing to do with them!
What the hell is this? A family picture?
Please don't make me repeat myself.
I told you I don't have money
Please don't make me say it a third time.
This frog has nothing to do with this.
There's no reason for me to hit it.
I said pay the protection fee too.
This creature isn't that loyal to me.
It's only trying to protect itself.
not to make me say it a third time.
Making me say it over and over again
I hate it because it's pointless.
-You want part of this young man's skin?
I'd like you to harvest it, Koichi.
His deceased father was a bit special.
Even the smallest sliver is fine.
I will cover all your travel expenses.
I don't mean to be rude,
but he reminds me a little of you, Jotaro.
There's no one in this neighborhood
foolish enough to steal from those men.
Wow, this must be a safe area.
-Would you like to stop in for a bite?
Giorno, come have tea with me.
There's only one girl I like. Move along.
You! How did you find me?
I really feel bad about this,
but I don't have it anymore. I sold it.
I'm not letting you get away.
Why does my hand feel so heavy?
that the car didn't break down?
the same kind of ability that I do?
to get out of 3 Freeze so easily.
Don't even think about pursuing me.
I'll say this for your sake,
but you shouldn't do pointless things.
The attack on the tree came back to me.
Yet based on how easy you went on me
I can tell you're a decent person.
There is no doubt in my mind.
You made it to Italy safely?
The one you sent me to find.
How do you suggest I talk to him?
I ran into him at the airport.
Yes, let me tell you what I've found out.
he goes by the name Giorno Giovanna.
are somehow drawn to one another.
Meeting him was a real coincidence.
but he's involved in some shady things.
He swiped my money and my luggage.
Also, his Stand may have the ability
to return an enemy's very own attack back.
I'll get you a hotel right away
An acquaintance of his told me
Were you connected to him somehow?
You mean the DIO with the bow and arrow?
That's why I wanted to confirm
and if he had inherited his father's body.
DIO's body had Joestar blood in it.
It may be a sign that his Stand abilities
There must have been a catalyst.
it may be an effect of another
strong Stand User being in his proximity.
I guess I'm a bit richer now.
If someone's bag were to drop here
Of course not. I'd take it.
What if I were a plainclothes
police officer and I saw you take it?
Then I'd split the money with you
and have you look the other way.
I can tell whether a person
You know how your skin gets shiny
But I'll have an even better idea
if I get a taste of your sweat.
with his head bashed in by his own shovel.
I'm searching for the man who did that.
Leaky Eye Luca was at the airport.
Therefore, I've come to ask you myself.
Plenty of others had a motive to kill him.
He knew how to get people
is not thinking of revenge for him.
Having one of his own killed
is like having mud thrown in his face.
That's why the Boss asked me to find
who did this to Luca and put an end to it.
I have a question for you.
Did you not meet Leaky Eye Luca
Those are all the questions I have.
Sorry to bother you, Giorno Giovanna.
so I took it with me.
is the taste of a lie.
I said I was done with my questions,
but it seems the situation has changed.
Now I'd have to find out
why you lied to me, wouldn't I?
Would you like me to punch you too?
What do you think of my special ability?
Let me tell you the truth.
My boss put an end to Leaky Eye Luca.
There was no point in keeping him alive.
-I took his fingers to torture you.
Is he also like that Japanese tourist?
I can put anything in your mouth.
I can stuff that fire extinguisher
But if I did that, you'd die.
There's no doubt he has a similar ability.
the torture will only get worse.
I'll have no choice but to use Golden Wind
